steps.title: Separate the sentences
steps.content: The phrase "according to some economists" completes one sentence about what the Laffer curve can determine. The next idea begins a new independent sentence about what the 2017 data suggested.

steps.title: Avoid run-ons and fragments
steps.content: A creates a run-on between independent clauses. B creates a comma splice. C puts a semicolon before a dependent clause beginning with "as," which is not allowed. A period correctly separates the two complete sentences. The answer is D.
